---
title: "RyanTest"
output: html_document
---

library(alarmdata)
library(redist)
library(dplyr)
map_NY <- alarm_50state_map('NY')


library(ggplot2)
library(ggredist)

# map_NY |> 
#  ggplot() +
#  geom_district(aes(group = cd_2020, fill = ndv, denom = nrv + ndv)) +
#  scale_fill_party_c() +
#  theme_map()
  

map_NY2 = redist_map(map_NY, existing_plan=cd_2020, pop_tol=0.005,
total_pop = pop, adj = map_NY$adj)

NY_plans = redist_smc(map_NY2, nsims=10)


library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork) # for plotting

redist.plot.plans(NY_plans, draws=c("cd_2020", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5"), shp=map_NY2)
